questions.question: Explain the difference between thresholding and edge detection. Provide an example of a real-world scenario where each technique is applied.
questions.hint: Focus on the applications of thresholding and edge detection in image processing.

questions.question: What is the purpose of the Otsu's method in binary thresholding? How does it differ from the simple thresholding technique?
questions.hint: Be sure to provide a clear explanation of Otsu's method and its advantages over simple thresholding.

questions.question: A binary image has two regions of different intensities, grey and black. If the global thresholding value is set to 127, describe the effect on the image. Would the segmentation result be correct? Explain.
questions.hint: Focus on the impact of the threshold value on the image segmentation process.
